# Merkaba Digital
> Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that makes businesses visible in AI search systems

## About
Merkaba Digital optimizes businesses for visibility in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude. Founded in 2026, based on 15+ years of digital strategy experience.

## Services
- AI Visibility Audit: comprehensive analysis of brand mentions across 5 AI platforms
- Entity Authority Building: structured data, knowledge graph, authority signals
- Content Engineering: AI-optimized content creation and optimization
- AI Visibility Dashboard: real-time monitoring and reporting

## Packages
- LAUNCH: $5,000 one-time audit with action plan
- GROWTH: from $8,500/month (min 6 months) full optimization + dashboard
- DOMINANCE: from $15,000/month (min 12 months) premium full service

## Contact
- Website: https://merkaba.vip
- Email: info@merkaba.vip

## Languages
English, Russian, Turkish, Arabic
